frameworks.name: feature-pool account
frameworks.one_line: VSTM stores features in independent pools rather than bound objects

frameworks.name: object-binding account
frameworks.one_line: obligatory binding of features into unified object representations in VSTM

frameworks.name: signal-detection theory
frameworks.one_line: continuous-report recovers precision and probability components of recall noise

core_question: Are the basic units of visual short-term memory objects or features?
key_assumptions: memory noise is non-negligible and must be recovered, not assumed away
recall can be decomposed into precision and probability of remembering
orientation and color of a single object can be probed independently
manipulations: feature probed at test (orientation vs color of the same object)
key_findings: recall precision for one feature is independent of recall precision for another feature of the same object
recall failures occur independently across features of the same object
interpretations: results argue against an obligatory object-binding step in VSTM
results support a feature-pool account of VSTM storage
